case_title: REDWOOD SANDRA VS ELDRIDGE ANTHONY C/O CARE OF U.S POST .DPTO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY REDWOOD SANDRA AS TO DEFENDANT ELDRIDGE ANTHONY  C/O CARE OF U.S POST .DPTO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO ANTHONY ELDRIDGE RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ELDRIDGE ANTHONY  C/O CARE OF U.S POST .DPTO.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELDRIDGE ANTHONY  C/O CARE OF U.S POST .DPTO.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $473.12 AS TO DEFENDANT ELDRIDGE ANTHONY  C/O CARE OF U.S POST .DPTO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDWOOD SANDRA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELDRIDGE ANTHONY  C/O CARE OF U.S POST .DPTO. $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $439.00, ONE MONTH RENT, DEFENDANT'S 1/2 SHARE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
